ogTitle: Jerrys Plains vs Jesmond: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jerrys Plains and Jesmond.
heading: Jerrys Plains vs Jesmond — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jerrys Plains, New South Wales and Jesmond, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jerrys Plains has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Jesmond (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jerrys Plains or Jesmond safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jerrys Plains has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Jesmond scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jerrys Plains scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Jesmond scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jerrys Plains or Jesmond?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jerrys Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
